title: Acme Supply v. Delta Distributors — anticipatory breach of goods contract
relief_sought: Costs and reasonable attorney fees if contract provides
key_facts: Written contract dated January 5, 2025 for delivery of 500 units on March 15, 2025.
Defendant emailed March 1, 2025 refusing to accept delivery without legal excuse.
Plaintiff resold goods at market and seeks price differential.

contract_clauses.name: Delivery clause
contract_clauses.text: Seller shall deliver 500 units FOB Little Rock on March 15, 2025.

contract_clauses.name: Remedies clause
contract_clauses.text: Upon breach, non-breaching party may resell in good faith and recover expectation damages.
